(Re-Notice) Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or In The Alternative, Further Motion To Compel And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltfs;
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Krzyszlo Jonczyk's Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or In The Alternative, Further Motion To Compel; And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiffs Neuza De Fatima, Maria V. Dasilva, and Ana P. De Souza is granted in part and denied in part. The motion for terminating sanctions is granted as to Plaintiffs Neuza De Fatima and Maria V. Dasilva. No opposition has been filed. The court finds that additional orders to compel responses would not result in compliance. The motion is moot as to Plaintiff Ana P. De Souza as she dismissed her complaint with prejudice on March 9, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
